guide_review_response.verdict: ITEM_3_1_V2_EFFECTIVELY_SATISFIED -- AUTHORIZE option (a) spec-correction; PROCEED to Item 3.2
guide_review_response.work_item: 3.1.v2 -- v2-baseline file presence verification + escalation_watchdog.ps1 hyphen-vs-underscore spec drift disposition

reviewing.ea_artifact: EA-1 chat report at Item 3.1.v2 STOP with hyphen-vs-underscore mismatch on escalation_watchdog.ps1
reviewing.stop_trigger: Item-N verify-clause-fail rule + r2 + dn3-equivalent (procedural-defect discovery without LA authorization for inline-fix)

guide_review_response.summary:
EA-1's STOP-and-report at Item 3.1.v2 surfaces a real spec drift, not a copy failure. Independent disk verification confirms: (a) BlarAI source has `escalation_watchdog.ps1` (UNDERSCORE) + `escalation-watchdog.xml` (HYPHEN) -- a naming inconsistency in BlarAI source itself. (b) devplatform faithfully mirrors the source pair (both files present under their canonical BlarAI names). (c) The .xml's internal <Command> reference uses the underscore form (`escalation_watchdog.ps1`), confirming UNDERSCORE is the canonical .ps1 filename. (d) The HYPHEN form `escalation-watchdog.ps1` does NOT exist anywhere on disk in either repo.
Authoritative cross-references confirming UNDERSCORE as canonical: - `tools/scheduled-tasks/escalation-watchdog.xml` internal `` ref (disk verification) - `WORKFLOW_INTEGRITY_REVIEW.md` line 56: G-1 fix list cites `tools/scheduled-tasks/escalation_watchdog.ps1` (underscore) - `WORKFLOW_INTEGRITY_REVIEW.md` Appendix A.1 line 174: same - `03_STAGE2_REFACTOR_MULTIPROJECT.xml` line 64: 2.4.v2 G-1 R12 entry uses underscore - `05_STAGE4_CUTOVER.xml` lines 99 + 107: 4.7.6 PS1 line-by-line scan uses underscore - `EA_2.5.v2_VERIFICATION_EVIDENCE.txt` line 8: AST probe verification used underscore - `EA_HANDOFF_STAGE2_MIDSTAGE_v4.xml` + `v5.xml` git_status_porcelain blocks list M file path with underscore - Stage 2 single substantive commit `3d1ac35` git tree contains the file under underscore name
Root cause of the typo: `INFRA_DELTA_v2.md §1.6` line 121 + `§1.7` line 125 + line 134 + line 337 use HYPHEN form for the .ps1 (`escalation-watchdog.ps1`). The hyphen propagated forward: - `04_STAGE3_COPY_TOOLS.xml §3.1.v2` `` block line 60 inherits the hyphen typo - This Guide-#7 init pointer's `g7-ea1_n3` v2-baseline file list inherits from the Stage 3 XML (lines 814 + 815 + 1382)
The typo is documentation-only -- it never reaches runtime, the actual file system, or git history. The Stage 2 chokepoint refactor (2.4.v2 G-1 work) modified the underscore file correctly; AST-driven verification at 2.5.v2 verified the underscore file; v4 + v5 handoffs tracked the underscore file as M; 3d1ac35 committed the underscore file. The HYPHEN form is a paper trail through INFRA_DELTA_v2.md and Stage 3 XML scope only.
DISPOSITION: option (a) AUTHORIZED -- spec-correction via Stage 3.10 STATUS append closure footnote (mirrors Stage 2.10.1 N-correction + g7-ea1_n10 STATUS-staleness-correction patterns). Item 3.1.v2 transitions from STOP to EFFECTIVELY-SATISFIED: - Actual file present on disk in BOTH BlarAI source AND devplatform copy (under UNDERSCORE name, the canonical name) - Test-Path against the corrected spec (`escalation_watchdog.ps1` UNDERSCORE) returns True for both repos - The Test-Path FALSE that EA-1 observed was against the typo'd HYPHEN spec, not against a missing file - No recopy operation needed (the file is already correctly copied at canonical name)
Option (b) source-rename REJECTED: would violate BlarAI-untouched-except-3.10-STATUS-append invariant; would touch Stage-3-scope BlarAI source; would also need Task Scheduler XML `` rewrite + caller updates. EA-1 correctly flagged as out-of-scope.
Option (c) no-action partially honored: the spec drift IS recorded in Stage 3.10 closure footnote (per option (a)), but option (a) goes further by explicitly correcting the forward-going expectation so future audit-chain artifacts don't perpetuate the typo.
NEW ack g7-ea1_n11 added below: Stage 3.10 STATUS append must include a closure footnote documenting the v2-baseline spec drift + canonical name verification.
Stage 3 invariants preserved through Item 3.1.v2 STOP cycle: - BlarAI source untouched (`git status --porcelain` empty) - devplatform tools/ uncommitted (substantive commit deferred to 3.9 per i1-1 + g7-ea1_n8 single-Stage-3-commit discipline) - fleet still paused (state.json invariants verbatim per V0f baseline) - stash@{0} byte-identical (12-cycle preservation continuing) - BlarAI HEAD: 77e26a9 (Guide-#7 + EA-1 + verdict docs-only commit; no advance) - devplatform HEAD: 3894221 (LA's between-stages registry edit; baseline acknowledged) - No silent fix; no source rename; no init pointer amendment
PROCEED authorization granted for Item 3.2 (platform-doctrine docs copy by pattern) after EA-1 acknowledges this disposition + new ack g7-ea1_n11 in next chat reply.

check.output: escalation_watchdog.ps1 (UNDERSCORE) escalation-watchdog.xml (HYPHEN) toast_watchdog.ps1 (UNDERSCORE; same naming pattern) toast-watchdog.xml (HYPHEN; same naming pattern)
check.classification: BlarAI source naming convention for scheduled-task pairs: .ps1 uses underscore, .xml uses hyphen. This pattern is consistent across the watchdog pair (escalation + toast). The typo in INFRA_DELTA_v2.md §1.7 misnamed the .ps1 with hyphen; the consistency check against toast_watchdog.ps1 (also underscore) confirms underscore is the actual convention, not the hyphen.

check.output: escalation_watchdog.ps1 (UNDERSCORE; same as source) escalation-watchdog.xml (HYPHEN; same as source) toast_watchdog.ps1 (UNDERSCORE; same as source) toast-watchdog.xml (HYPHEN; same as source)
check.classification: Stage 3.1 Copy-Item -Recurse executed correctly. The watchdog file pair is byte-for-byte present in devplatform under canonical (BlarAI source) names. No copy failure; no silent file rename during copy.

check.output: C:/Users/mrbla/BlarAI/tools/scheduled-tasks/escalation-watchdog.xml (file matches; internal grep on the file finds 'escalation_watchdog.ps1' UNDERSCORE)
check.classification: The escalation-watchdog.xml task-XML file's internal <Command> / <Arguments> section references the .ps1 by its UNDERSCORE name. This is the runtime authoritative binding: when the Windows Task Scheduler fires the Escalation Watchdog task, it invokes the .ps1 file by underscore name. If the .ps1 had ever been named with hyphen, the task would have failed at runtime since at least Stage 2.5 verification. The fleet has been operating with this pair for the entire Sprint 8/9 era; underscore is the canonical .ps1 filename.

check.findings:
Grep across docs/platform_separation/ for `escalation_watchdog.ps1` (underscore): - 03_STAGE2_REFACTOR_MULTIPROJECT.xml line 64 (2.4.v2 G-1 R12) - 05_STAGE4_CUTOVER.xml lines 99 + 107 (4.7.6 PS1 line-by-line scan) - EA_2.5.v2_VERIFICATION_EVIDENCE.txt line 8 (AST probe verification PASS) - WORKFLOW_INTEGRITY_REVIEW.md lines 56 + 70 + 174 + 298 + 313 (G-1 + Appendix A.1) - EA_HANDOFF_STAGE2_MIDSTAGE_v4.xml lines 37 + 72 + 162 + 210 (M file, Item 2.5 disposition, AST verification) - EA_HANDOFF_STAGE2_MIDSTAGE_v5.xml line 38 (M file) - 9 Guide-#5 disposition files + 2 EA iter-1 gate files (variously)
Grep for `escalation-watchdog.ps1` (hyphen): - INFRA_DELTA_v2.md §1.6 line 121 (typo origin: "Pairs with escalation-watchdog.ps1") - INFRA_DELTA_v2.md §1.7 line 125 (typo origin: tool files header) - INFRA_DELTA_v2.md line 134 (typo: Stage 4 task-XML rewrite mention; conflated with the .xml export name which IS hyphen) - INFRA_DELTA_v2.md line 337 (typo: 04_STAGE3_COPY_TOOLS.xml file_inventory) - 04_STAGE3_COPY_TOOLS.xml §3.1.v2 line 60 (inherited from INFRA_DELTA_v2.md) - 3.0-EA_INITIALIZATION_INSTANCE_1_STAGE3_COPY_TOOLS.xml lines 814 + 815 + 1382 (inherited from Stage 3 XML)
check.classification:
Stage 2 work + WORKFLOW_INTEGRITY_REVIEW + AST probe + EA mid-stage handoffs + Stage 4 + Stage 6 monitoring scripts ALL use UNDERSCORE consistently for the .ps1. The HYPHEN form is confined to INFRA_DELTA_v2.md §1.6 + §1.7 (root-cause documentation typo from the v2 delta-capture session 2026-04-24+) and propagates only to 04_STAGE3_COPY_TOOLS.xml §3.1.v2 + this Guide-#7 init pointer's g7-ea1_n3.
UNDERSCORE is canonical; HYPHEN is documentation drift in 2 source files (one of which is locked stage XML; one of which is INFRA_DELTA_v2.md).

check.findings: - BlarAI working tree: clean (git status --porcelain empty post-Item-3.1 copy; no BlarAI-side mutation; copy was devplatform-only as Stage 3 design dictates) - devplatform working tree: ?? tools/ entry (single untracked top-level dir; the 7 dirs + 2 helpers + claude_cowork/projects all roll up under the single ?? since devplatform main tree has nothing else recursing into tools/) - BlarAI HEAD: 77e26a9 (Guide-#7 + EA-1 + verdict docs-only commit per amend cycle; no advance) - devplatform HEAD: 3894221 (LA's between-stages registry edit; carries forward) - state.json: fleet_paused=true; reason "platform separation v2 in progress"; last_updated_by="copilot_agent"; last_updated_utc="2026-04-24T20:46:12Z" (preserved) - stash@{0}: byte-identical timestamp 20260424_013002 (12+-cycle preservation) - 7 platform tool directories present in devplatform/tools/ + 2 chokepoint helpers (_vikunja_client.py + _project_context.py) confirmed via Test-Path - openvino_contrib_agent NOT present in devplatform/tools/ (correctly excluded per Stage 3.1 do-not-copy clause)
check.classification: EA-1's STOP discipline preserved every Stage 3 invariant. Read-only verification work + Item 3.1 copy (deferred-commit) + STOP at Item 3.1.v2 verify clause failure. Substantive commit deferred to Item 3.9 per single-Stage-3-commit discipline. Standing invariants intact.

new_acknowledgment.ack:
Stage 3.10 STATUS append closure footnote: v2-baseline spec drift on escalation_watchdog.ps1 hyphen-vs-underscore. Required text (verbatim) for the Stage 3.10 cumulative-footnote set:
"Item 3.1.v2 verify clause surfaced a documentation-vs-disk drift on `escalation_watchdog.ps1` filename. The init pointer's g7-ea1_n3 verify list (and its upstream sources, INFRA_DELTA_v2.md §1.6 line 121 + §1.7 line 125 + line 134 + line 337, and 04_STAGE3_COPY_TOOLS.xml §3.1.v2 `` block line 60) used the hyphen form `escalation-watchdog.ps1`. The actual on-disk file in BlarAI source + devplatform copy is `escalation_watchdog.ps1` (UNDERSCORE). The HYPHEN form does NOT exist anywhere on disk; the canonical underscore form is authoritative per (a) BlarAI source disk content, (b) the escalation-watchdog.xml task-XML internal `` reference (which invokes the .ps1 by underscore name at runtime), (c) Stage 2.4.v2 G-1 R12 refactor + Stage 4.7.6 PS1 line-by-line scan + Stage 2.5.v2 AST probe verification + Stage 2 substantive commit 3d1ac35 (all use underscore), (d) WORKFLOW_INTEGRITY_REVIEW.md G-1 + Appendix A.1 (use underscore), (e) consistency with sibling toast_watchdog.ps1 (also underscore). The HYPHEN form is documentation drift originating in INFRA_DELTA_v2.md §1.6 + §1.7 (v2 delta-capture session 2026-04-24+) and inherited by 04_STAGE3_COPY_TOOLS.xml §3.1.v2. Per dn3-equivalent (stage XMLs are locked artifacts), the typo is NOT corrected inline; forward-corrected in Guide-#7 verdict file docs/platform_separation/temp_for_responses/3.1.v2-GUIDE_RESPONSE_INSTANCE_7_ITEM_3_1_V2_VERIFIED_SPEC_CORRECTION_AUTHORIZED.xml and at this STATUS append. **A Stage 6.7.5-pattern hardening ticket is REQUIRED** to clean up the INFRA_DELTA_v2.md §1.6 line 121 + §1.7 line 125 + line 134 + line 337 typos and the 04_STAGE3_COPY_TOOLS.xml §3.1.v2 line 60 inherited typo. Per LA mature-not-minimal motto and the LA directive at 2026-04-27 ('non-optional if it means cleaning up documentation'), this ticket is mandatory at Stage 6.7.5 (LA may triage priority -- LOW expected for a doc-only typo; ticket creation is non-optional). Joins the existing S-1 + S-3 Stage 6.7.5 ticket set. Item 3.1.v2 EFFECTIVELY SATISFIED: the actual file is present on disk in BOTH BlarAI source AND devplatform copy under canonical underscore name; Test-Path against the corrected spec returns True; no recopy needed."
Status transitions to SATISFIED at Stage 3.10 STATUS append landing. Joins the Stage 3.10 cumulative-footnote set: g7-ea1_n9 (Stage 3 closure entry) + g7-ea1_n10 (STATUS.md devplatform-HEAD line correction) + g7-ea1_n11 (this footnote on the v2-baseline spec drift) + ack-count correction footnote (per nature_of_this_file forward-correction at 2026-04-27 in init pointer).

required_acknowledgments.ack_to_emit_at_start_of_next_chat_turn: EA-1 acknowledges before Item 3.2 work begins: (a) Item 3.1.v2 EFFECTIVELY SATISFIED. The HYPHEN form `escalation-watchdog.ps1` is a documentation typo; the canonical UNDERSCORE form `escalation_watchdog.ps1` is present in BOTH BlarAI source AND devplatform copy. Re-run Test-Path against the corrected spec for confirmation; expect True for both repos. NO recopy operation needed. (b) New ack g7-ea1_n11 added to FORWARD-ACTIVE-AT-3.10 set; binding through Stage 3.10 STATUS append footnote per verbatim text above. Stage 3.10 cumulative-footnote set is now: g7-ea1_n9 + g7-ea1_n10 + g7-ea1_n11 + ack-count correction footnote. (c) Stage 3 invariants reaffirmed: BlarAI untouched; devplatform Item 3.1 copy stays uncommitted (substantive commit at 3.9); fleet paused; stash byte-identical; no silent fix to INFRA_DELTA_v2.md or 04_STAGE3_COPY_TOOLS.xml (locked). (d) Standing reminders r1-r5 still apply.

guide_review_response.proceed_authorization:
PROCEED -- EA-1 may declare Item 3.1.v2 EFFECTIVELY SATISFIED (with g7-ea1_n11 forward-correction footnote staged for Stage 3.10) and execute Item 3.2 (platform-doctrine docs copy by pattern) in the next chat turn.
Stage 3 execution order from this point (per init pointer + 04_STAGE3_COPY_TOOLS.xml): Item 3.2: Copy doctrine docs by pattern (CLAUDE_*.md, CLAUDE_*.xml, CO_LEAD_*.xml, DEC*.xml, DOMAIN*.xml, CONTINUATION_PROMPT.md). Source: BlarAI/docs/. Destination: devplatform/docs/. Item 3.2.v2: Copy docs/governance/ (recursive, 7 files) + docs/scheduled/wake_templates/ (recursive, 6 files) per g7-ea1_n4. Item 3.3: Copy claude_cowork/ + claude_projects/ if populated. Item 3.4: Populate devplatform/pyproject.toml from BlarAI/pyproject.toml minus runtime deps. Item 3.5: cd devplatform; pip install -e . (sanity verify + import check). Item 3.6: Copy MCP configs with `${env:VIKUNJA_PASS}` env-var pattern per g7-ea1_n1 (F-1 mitigation devplatform half). Item 3.7: Smoke test daily_digest --dry-run from devplatform per g7-ea1_n6. Item 3.8: Verify devplatform/docs/ has no BlarAI-only doc patterns per g7-ea1_n7. Item 3.9: Single Stage-3 commit on devplatform main per g7-ea1_n8 (parent 3894221). Item 3.10: Append-only STATUS.md update on BlarAI side per g7-ea1_n9 + g7-ea1_n10 + g7-ea1_n11 + ack-count correction footnote. Item 3.10.v2: Write devplatform/.copy_manifest_v2.yaml per g7-ea1_n5.
Stop conditions during Stage 3 (unchanged from init pointer + verdict §proceed_authorization): - Any Item-N verify clause fails -> STOP and report. - Stage 3.2 doctrine-doc pattern overshoot (BlarAI-only doc copied to devplatform) -> STOP per g7-ea1_n7. - Stage 3.5 `pip install -e .` fails -> STOP; do NOT modify dep list silently. - Stage 3.6 VIKUNJA_PASS literal slips into devplatform MCP config -> STOP per g7-ea1_n1. - Stage 3.7 $BLARAI_PID drift -> STOP per g4-5; NO silent regex/yaml adaptation. - Stage 3.8 BlarAI-only docs absence Select-String returns non-empty -> STOP. - Stage 3.9 commit produces more than ONE commit OR omits any expected file -> STOP per g7-ea1_n8. - Stage 3.10 STATUS append modifies pre-existing sections -> STOP per g7-ea1_n9. - Context exhaustion at any clean breakpoint (post-3.5 dep-install close; post-3.7 smoke-test close; post-3.8 docs-absence-verify close) -> emit Stage-3-mid-stage-handoff XML (docs-only commit; ONE file in diff) per i1-4 + g6-ea6_n4 + g7-ea1_n8 + r5. - Any other procedural defect -> STOP and report; do NOT inline-fix without LA authorization.
Standing invariants unchanged: single substantive Stage 3 commit on devplatform main at item 3.9 only (parent 3894221); fleet stays paused (NEVER state.resume_fleet); no merge to main; stash@{0} untouched (12+-cycle byte-identity preservation continuing); STATUS append-only at item 3.10. Standing reminders r1-r5 + 9 g7-ea1 acks (n1-n9 from init pointer + n10 from iter-1 verdict + n11 from this verdict) apply throughout.
After Item 3.10 + 3.10.v2 land, EA-1 emits the closing handoff to LA per the `closing_handoff_to_la_at_stage_3_close` block in the EA-1 init pointer.
guide_review_response.next_action_for_la:
Forward this Guide-#7 verdict file to the EA-1 chat. Specifically:
File path: docs/platform_separation/temp_for_responses/3.1.v2-GUIDE_RESPONSE_INSTANCE_7_ITEM_3_1_V2_VERIFIED_SPEC_CORRECTION_AUTHORIZED.xml
Suggested chat message to EA-1: "Item 3.1.v2 disposition: option (a) AUTHORIZED per Guide-#7 verdict at the attached file path. The HYPHEN spec was a typo originating in INFRA_DELTA_v2.md §1.7; canonical filename is `escalation_watchdog.ps1` (UNDERSCORE) and is present on disk in both BlarAI source and devplatform copy. Item 3.1.v2 EFFECTIVELY SATISFIED; no recopy. New ack g7-ea1_n11 added (FORWARD-ACTIVE-AT-3.10) -- closure footnote at Stage 3.10 documents the spec drift. Acknowledge OQ disposition + g7-ea1_n11 + invariants reaffirmation in your next chat reply, then begin Item 3.2 (doctrine docs copy by pattern) per init pointer §work_plan_pointer."
No pre-PROCEED commit needed (BlarAI working tree clean; devplatform working tree correctly carries Item 3.1 copy as ?? for substantive commit at 3.9). The Guide-#7 verdict file at the path above is itself a new untracked file in BlarAI that may be bundled into the eventual mid-stage or closing handoff commit -- no immediate commit required.
